message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Updates beads issue tracker with new and updated issues:

- Added bd-2cgj: Fix symbol request zone validation + tailscale tag
  conversion panic (in_progress, P1 bug assigned to TurquoiseIsland)

This issue tracks the zone_to_tag panic removal and zone_id consistency
validation work that's being implemented across fcp-tailscale.
